task: Insert the pencil into the pencil sharpener
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A pencil lies on a white cloth, and a pencil sharpener is positioned nearby. The pencil is a slender, elongated object with a pointed tip; the sharpener has a cylindrical body with a top opening. STRATEGY - First, grasp the pencil to pick it up. Then, transport it to the sharpener. Finally, insert the pencil into the sharpener's top opening. Failure modes include dropping the pencil during transport or misaligning it during insertion. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Grasp the pencil at its body for a secure hold. Step 2: Transport the pencil to the sharpener's top opening. Step 3: Insert the pencil into the sharpener's top opening.**
Goal: inside(pencil, pencil_sharpener)
Scene: pencil, pencil_sharpener, cloth
Step 1: grasp(pencil)
  affordance_region: the body of the pencil
  contact: holding(pencil) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pencil)
Step 2: transport(pencil -> pencil_sharpener)
  affordance_region: the top opening of the pencil sharpener
  spatial: above(pencil, pencil_sharpener, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(pencil)
  done_when: above(pencil, pencil_sharpener, 0.05)
Step 3: insert(pencil -> pencil_sharpener)
  affordance_region: the top opening of the pencil sharpener
  contact: inside(pencil, pencil_sharpener) [completion]
  pose: aligned(pencil, pencil_sharpener) [completion]
  done_when: inside(pencil, pencil_sharpener)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the top opening of the pencil sharpener
the top opening of the pencil sharpener
